case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS WELLS FARGO BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $241.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
